pokemon:iron-leaves.name: Iron Leaves
pokemon:iron-leaves.summary: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.
According to the few eyewitness accounts that exist, it used its shining blades to julienne large trees and boulders.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.

form:iron-leaves.name: Iron Leaves
form:iron-leaves.summary: Iron Leaves form with Grass / Psychic typing.
expansionNotes: Location and breeding metadata can be expanded with a fuller encounter import.
breedingNotes: Breeding notes are pending a richer source import.
